title: [Tacz]Maxstuff
description: A tacz addon adding a variety of STUFF that MAX wants to add
body:
# What is maxstuff?

Maxstuff is an addon for [TACZ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/timeless-and-classics-zero) adding the stuff that Max wants to add, ranging from obscure balkan aks to weapons from your favourite games and everything else inbetween.

It features a current total of 109 guns and 19 attachments as of 1.7

# How do I install it?

The version packaged as a mod is on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/maxstuff) but you can find both the mod and zip version on the [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/maxstuff)

For the zip drag it into your tacz folder in your minecraft directory.

For the mod version install as you would any other mod.

## Which version should I use?

The mod version contains some small extra features but its not a massive change compared to the zip.

If you are planning to modify the pack for a modpack or server here is something to note.
For the zip version you can just modify the pack However for the mod you are going to have to turn off tacz overwrite to be able to modify it. Otherwise your edits will reset after restarting the game.

Before modifying the pack I would reccomend reading the readme.

## Dependencies

[![text](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/776901229439615020/1339717379269070928/Ol1Tcf8_-_Copy.png?ex=67afbc89&is=67ae6b09&hm=dac2c929a2bb4c3da6b371cd9a151377fca6bd9f00de39d4d750fccb09353b46&)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-endless-ammo)

Also [TACZ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/timeless-and-classics-zero)
